episodes.title: The Disturbing Story of America's Deadliest Cult
episodes.description:

What really happened at Jonestown? This is one of the most disturbing True Crime cases of all time... 

Long before the tragic events of November 18, 1978, Jim Jones was a charismatic leader who built the Peoples Temple on promises of racial equality and social justice. But the truth is, this really was a cult! In this deep dive, Joey and Josh go beyond the "drinking the Kool-Aid" myth to uncover the terrifying reality of a socialist utopia turned into a jungle prison cult! 

We set the scene in 1970s America, exploring how Jones used the Civil Rights movement and the fear of nuclear war to manipulate over 900 people into relocating to the remote rainforests of Guyana to a place called: *Jonestown*. We break down the "miracle healings," the political influence Jones held in San Francisco, and the chilling "White Nights" rehearsals that prepared the congregation for the unthinkable.

From the arrival of Congressman Leo Ryan to the brutal airstrip ambush and the final moments in the pavilion, we examine the evidence of forced murder versus self-deletion. This isn't just a story about a cult; it’s a breakdown of how one man’s paranoia led to the largest loss of American civilian life in a non-natural disaster until 9/11.

If you're affected in anyway by the content of this episode visit https://www.thecalmzone.net/
